description: Create a downloadable digital product in WooCommerce named 'Vintage Floral Cross-Stitch Pattern' with SKU 'VFCS-PAT-001'. Set the regular price to $12.99 and sale price to $9.99. Configure the product as a virtual, downloadable simple product. Upload the file located at '/home/ga/Documents/vintage_floral_pattern.pdf' with the file name 'Vintage Floral Pattern PDF', setting a download limit of 3 and a download expiry of 30 days. Create a new category named 'Digital Patterns' and assign the product to it. Include the short description: 'Beautiful vintage floral cross-stitch pattern with full color chart and symbol guide. Suitable for intermediate stitchers.' Publish the product immediately.
